bio: Hamid-Reza Haji Babaee is a conservative politician from Hamadan Province serving as First Deputy Speaker of the 12th [Majlis](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) under [Speaker Ghalibaf](/people/mohammad-bagher-ghalibaf). He previously served as Minister of Education under [Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) (2009–2013). A long-serving principlist MP, he represents the established traditional conservative wing of the Majlis.
editorial_notes: Born 1955. Minister of Education 2009–2013 under Ahmadinejad.
